verses.1: Now there was a man of the Pharisees named Nicodemus, a leader of the Jews.
verses.2: He came to Jesus at night and said, "Rabbi, we know that You are a teacher who has come from God. For no one could perform the signs You are doing if God were not with him."

3.text: Jesus replied, "Truly, truly, I tell you, no one can see the kingdom of God unless he is born again."
3.speaker: Jesus

verses.4: "How can a man be born when he is old?" Nicodemus asked. "Can he enter his mother's womb a second time to be born?"

5.text: Jesus answered, "Truly, truly, I tell you, no one can enter the kingdom of God unless he is born of water and the Spirit.
5.speaker: Jesus

6.text: Flesh is born of flesh, but spirit is born of the Spirit.
6.speaker: Jesus

7.text: Do not be amazed that I said, 'You must be born again.'
7.speaker: Jesus

8.text: The wind blows where it wishes. You hear its sound, but you do not know where it comes from or where it is going. So it is with everyone born of the Spirit."
8.speaker: Jesus

segments.text: "and you do not understand these things?
segments.speaker: Jesus

11.text: Truly, truly, I tell you, we speak of what we know, and we testify to what we have seen, and yet you people do not accept our testimony.
11.speaker: Jesus

12.text: If I have told you about earthly things and you do not believe, how will you believe if I tell you about heavenly things?
12.speaker: Jesus

13.text: No one has ascended into heaven except the One who descended from heaven—the Son of Man, who is in heaven.
13.speaker: Jesus

14.text: Just as Moses lifted up the serpent in the wilderness, so the Son of Man must be lifted up,
14.speaker: Jesus

15.text: that everyone who believes in Him may have eternal life.
15.speaker: Jesus

16.text: For God so loved the world that He gave His one and only Son, that everyone who believes in Him shall not perish but have eternal life.
16.speaker: Jesus

17.text: For God did not send His Son into the world to condemn the world, but to save the world through Him.
17.speaker: Jesus

18.text: Whoever believes in Him is not condemned, but whoever does not believe has already been condemned, because he has not believed in the name of God's one and only Son.
18.speaker: Jesus

19.text: And this is the verdict: The Light has come into the world, but men loved the darkness rather than the Light because their deeds were evil.
19.speaker: Jesus

20.text: Everyone who does evil hates the Light, and does not come into the Light for fear that his deeds will be exposed.
20.speaker: Jesus

21.text: But whoever practices the truth comes into the Light, so that it may be seen clearly that what he has done has been accomplished in God."
21.speaker: Jesus

verses.22: After this, Jesus and His disciples went into the Judean countryside, where He spent some time with them and baptized.
verses.23: Now John was also baptizing at Aenon near Salim, because the water was plentiful there, and people kept coming to be baptized.
verses.24: (For John had not yet been thrown into prison.)
verses.25: Then a dispute arose between John's disciples and a certain Jew over ceremonial washing.
verses.26: So John's disciples came to him and said, "Look, Rabbi, the One who was with you beyond the Jordan, the One you testified about — He is baptizing, and everyone is going to Him."
verses.27: John replied, "A man can receive only what is given him from heaven.
verses.28: You yourselves can testify that I said, 'I am not the Christ, but am sent ahead of Him.'
verses.29: The bride belongs to the bridegroom. The friend of the bridegroom stands and listens for him, and is overjoyed to hear the bridegroom's voice. That joy is mine, and it is now complete.
verses.30: He must increase; I must decrease.
verses.31: The One who comes from above is above all. The one who is from the earth belongs to the earth and speaks as one from the earth. The One who comes from heaven is above all.
verses.32: He testifies to what He has seen and heard, yet no one accepts His testimony.
verses.33: Whoever accepts His testimony has certified that God is truthful.
verses.34: For the One whom God has sent speaks the words of God, for God does not give the Spirit by measure to Him.
verses.35: The Father loves the Son and has placed all things in His hands.
verses.36: Whoever believes in the Son has eternal life. Whoever rejects the Son will not see life. Instead, the wrath of God remains on him."

metadata.source: Derived from the Berean Standard Bible (BSB). Missing verses restored from the Textus Receptus tradition for completeness.
